analysis: You got into bed at 9:11pm on the 7th and 8:55pm on the 8th — both genuinely close to your 8:30 target, which is not nothing, that's your routine starting to stick. The 7th was a rougher night though, with multiple wake windows clustered between midnight and 4am that chopped up what should have been solid recovery time. The 8th looked cleaner through the first half, with a nice deep sleep block right at the start and fewer interruptions before 2am. That afternoon nap on the 7th — just over an hour at 2pm — is worth watching, because it's probably what pushed your sleep pressure down and made that night's fragmentation worse.
